knowledge_atoms.text: Amy: How was your summer holiday, Binbin?
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 艾米：你的暑假过得怎么样，彬彬？

knowledge_atoms.text: Bad luck often brings good luck.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 坏运气通常带来好运气。

knowledge_atoms.text: Can I come and visit you?
Hainan is far from here. How did you go there?
How was the beach? What did you do there?
I fell off my bike and hurt my foot.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 我从自行车上摔下来，伤了脚。

knowledge_atoms.text: I went to a forest park.

In the afternoon, Mum ate some bad fruit and didn't feel well. So we stayed in the hotel. Dad and I wanted to make her happy. We dressed up and made a funny play. Robin played the part of a dog. He was so cute. Max liked him so much. He jumped on him and licked him. Of course, Robin didn't like it. We laughed and laughed.
It was a bad day but also a good day!
John answered a phone call from Amy. Listen and tick or cross.
Oh dear! Are you all right?
Oh, yes. It looks like a mule! Did you go to Turpan?
That's too bad! Are you all right?

Today was a sunny day. In the morning, we rode a bike for three people. Max sat in a basket on the front of the bike. That was fun! We took pictures of the beautiful countryside. We bought some gifts and ate some delicious food.
What happened to Wu Binbin's family?
Where did Amy go last winter holiday?
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 艾米去年寒假去哪里了？

knowledge_atoms.text: Where did John go over his holiday? What did he do?
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 约翰假期去了哪里？他做了什么？

knowledge_atoms.text: Where did you go last Saturday?
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 上个星期六你去哪儿了？

knowledge_atoms.text: Where did you go over the winter holiday?
Where did you go over your holiday?
Wu Binbin: It was good. I went swimming every weekend and took lots of pictures.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 吴彬彬：很好。我每个周末都去游泳，还拍了很多照片。

knowledge_atoms.text: Yes, I did. I saw lots of grapes and ate lots of mutton kebabs. They were delicious.
Yes, I did. Oops, where did I put the pictures?
You didn't come to school. What happened?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Unit Three. Two boys are talking on the phone. One boy is at home with a hurt foot because he fell off his bike.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word fell off?
Can you say: What happened?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Where did you go?. Wu Binbin and John are sitting on the floor, looking at photos from John's trip to Turpan.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word Turpan?
Can you say: Where did you go?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Where did you go?. Amy and John are talking about John's Labour Day holiday.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word fell off?
Can you say: Where did you go?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Where did you go?. John's social media posts showing his past activities. The left post is from Tuesday May 1st 18:30, and the right post is from Saturday May 12th 15:30.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word rode a horse?
Can you say: Where did you go last Saturday?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Where did you go?. Sarah, Amy and Wu Binbin are talking about Amy's winter holiday in Sanya.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word winter holiday?
Can you say: Where did you go over the winter holiday?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Where did you go?. Illustrations of activities done during the summer holiday.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word ate fresh food?
Can you say: Amy: How was your summer holiday, Binbin?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Read and write. Wu Binbin finds a dog, names it Max, and introduces it to his parents.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: What's your name? How about "Max"?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: My weekend plan. Three pictures showing events from a story: Wu Binbin sick in bed, Robin playing with a dog, and the family riding a tandem bike.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Number the pictures.

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Where did you go?. Fill in the blanks with the correct past tense forms of verbs to complete sentences about dinosaurs.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word dinosaur?
Can you say: am/is → was

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Story time. Zoom dreams about going to the moon, meeting Chang'e and the rabbit, and returning by spaceship. He then wakes up and realizes it was a dream.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: How was your holiday?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Understand and say the core dialogue pattern on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Two boys are talking on the phone. One boy is at home with a hurt foot because he fell off his bike. Key patterns: What happened?; I fell off my bike and hurt my foot.
core_patterns: I fell off my bike and hurt my foot.
You didn't come to school. What happened?
Oh dear! Are you all right?
Can I come and visit you?
allowed_answer_scope: I fell off my bike and hurt my foot.
Sure! You can see my photos from the Labour Day holiday.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word fell off?
Can you say: What happened?
return_anchors: I fell off my bike and hurt my foot.
You didn't come to school. What happened?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Understand and say the core dialogue pattern on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Wu Binbin and John are sitting on the floor, looking at photos from John's trip to Turpan. Key patterns: Where did you go?; Did you go to Turpan?
core_patterns: Yes, I did. I saw lots of grapes and ate lots of mutton kebabs. They were delicious.
allowed_answer_scope: Yes, I did. I saw lots of grapes and ate lots of mutton kebabs. They were delicious.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word Turpan?
Can you say: Where did you go?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Catch the key information from the listening task.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: John answered a phone call from Amy. Listen and tick or cross. Key patterns: John answered a phone call from Amy. Listen and tick or cross.
core_patterns: John answered a phone call from Amy. Listen and tick or cross.
allowed_answer_scope: John answered a phone call from Amy. Listen and tick or cross.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: John answered a phone call from Amy. Listen and tick or cross.
return_anchors: John answered a phone call from Amy. Listen and tick or cross.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Understand and say the core dialogue pattern on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Amy and John are talking about John's Labour Day holiday. Key patterns: Where did you go?; Did you go to Turpan?
core_patterns: That's too bad! Are you all right?
Oh, yes. It looks like a mule! Did you go to Turpan?
allowed_answer_scope: I fell off my bike last Saturday and hurt my foot.
I'm OK now. Come and look at my photos from the Labour Day holiday.
Mt. Tianshan, Xinjiang. I rode a horse. Look, it's very small!
Yes, we did. We saw lots of grapes there, but we couldn't eat them. They won't be ready till August.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word fell off?
Can you say: Where did you go?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Use the page dialogue pattern in short guided practice.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Questions about John's and the student's holiday. Key patterns: Where did John go over his holiday? What did he do?; Where did you go over your holiday?
core_patterns: Where did John go over his holiday? What did he do?
Where did you go over your holiday?
allowed_answer_scope: Where did John go over his holiday? What did he do?
Where did you go over your holiday?
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Where did John go over his holiday? What did he do?
return_anchors: Where did John go over his holiday? What did he do?
Where did you go over your holiday?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Recognize and say the core vocabulary on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: John's social media posts showing his past activities. The left post is from Tuesday May 1st 18:30, and the right post is from Saturday May 12th 15:30. Key patterns: Where did you go last Saturday?; I went to a forest park.
core_patterns: Where did you go last Saturday?
I went to a forest park.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word rode a horse?
Can you say: Where did you go last Saturday?
return_anchors: Where did you go last Saturday?
I went to a forest park.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Retell the reading content by filling in key blanks.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Listen to the audio and fill in the blanks about what Carl, Meimei, and Mr Guo did yesterday. Key patterns: What did they do yesterday?
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: What did they do yesterday?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Catch the key information from the listening task.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Wu Binbin and Amy meet Sarah at school. Listen and circle. Key patterns: Listen and circle.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Listen and circle.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Understand and say the core dialogue pattern on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Sarah, Amy and Wu Binbin are talking about Amy's winter holiday in Sanya. Key patterns: Where did you go over the winter holiday?; How did you go there?
core_patterns: Where did you go over the winter holiday?
Hainan is far from here. How did you go there?
How was the beach? What did you do there?
allowed_answer_scope: My family and I went to Sanya.
It was beautiful. I took lots of pictures, and I also went swimming.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word winter holiday?
Can you say: Where did you go over the winter holiday?
return_anchors: Where did you go over the winter holiday?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Use the page dialogue pattern in short guided practice.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Questions about Amy's trip and a prompt for students to talk about their own winter holiday. Key patterns: Where did Amy go last winter holiday?; How did she go there?
core_patterns: Where did Amy go last winter holiday?
allowed_answer_scope: Where did Amy go last winter holiday?
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Where did Amy go last winter holiday?
return_anchors: Where did Amy go last winter holiday?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Recognize and say the core vocabulary on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Illustrations of activities done during the summer holiday. Key patterns: Amy: How was your summer holiday, Binbin?; Wu Binbin: It was good. I went swimming every weekend and took lots of pictures.
core_patterns: Amy: How was your summer holiday, Binbin?
Wu Binbin: It was good. I went swimming every weekend and took lots of pictures.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word ate fresh food?
Can you say: Amy: How was your summer holiday, Binbin?
return_anchors: Amy: How was your summer holiday, Binbin?
Wu Binbin: It was good. I went swimming every weekend and took lots of pictures.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Use the page dialogue pattern in short guided practice.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Andy is showing his summer holiday activities and a man wants to buy Robin. Key patterns: Last summer holiday, Andy ate ...; He took pictures of ...
allowed_answer_scope: Sorry. You can't buy him. He's my friend!
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Last summer holiday, Andy ate ...

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Use the page dialogue pattern in short guided practice.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Wu Binbin finds a dog, names it Max, and introduces it to his parents. Key patterns: What's your name? How about "Max"?; Hello, Max!
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: What's your name? How about "Max"?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Read and understand the key information in the passage.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Wu Binbin's diary about his day with his family and their new dog Max. Key patterns: Today was a sunny day. In the morning, we rode a bike for three people. Max sat in a basket on the front of the bike. That was fun! We took pictures of the beautiful countryside. We bought some gifts and ate some delicious food.; In the afternoon, Mum ate some bad fruit and didn't feel well. So we stayed in the hotel. Dad and I wanted to make her happy. We dressed up and made a funny play. Robin played the part of a dog. He was so cute. Max liked him so much. He jumped on him and licked him. Of course, Robin didn't like it. We laughed and laughed.
core_patterns: Today was a sunny day. In the morning, we rode a bike for three people. Max sat in a basket on the front of the bike. That was fun! We took pictures of the beautiful countryside. We bought some gifts and ate some delicious food.

In the afternoon, Mum ate some bad fruit and didn't feel well. So we stayed in the hotel. Dad and I wanted to make her happy. We dressed up and made a funny play. Robin played the part of a dog. He was so cute. Max liked him so much. He jumped on him and licked him. Of course, Robin didn't like it. We laughed and laughed.
It was a bad day but also a good day!
allowed_answer_scope: Today was a sunny day. In the morning, we rode a bike for three people. Max sat in a basket on the front of the bike. That was fun! We took pictures of the beautiful countryside. We bought some gifts and ate some delicious food.

In the afternoon, Mum ate some bad fruit and didn't feel well. So we stayed in the hotel. Dad and I wanted to make her happy. We dressed up and made a funny play. Robin played the part of a dog. He was so cute. Max liked him so much. He jumped on him and licked him. Of course, Robin didn't like it. We laughed and laughed.
It was a bad day but also a good day!
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Today was a sunny day. In the morning, we rode a bike for three people. Max sat in a basket on the front of the bike. That was fun! We took pictures of the beautiful countryside. We bought some gifts and ate some delicious food.
return_anchors: Today was a sunny day. In the morning, we rode a bike for three people. Max sat in a basket on the front of the bike. That was fun! We took pictures of the beautiful countryside. We bought some gifts and ate some delicious food.

In the afternoon, Mum ate some bad fruit and didn't feel well. So we stayed in the hotel. Dad and I wanted to make her happy. We dressed up and made a funny play. Robin played the part of a dog. He was so cute. Max liked him so much. He jumped on him and licked him. Of course, Robin didn't like it. We laughed and laughed.
It was a bad day but also a good day!

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Retell the reading content by filling in key blanks.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Two boxes labeled 'Bad:' and 'Good:' for students to list events. Key patterns: What happened to Wu Binbin's family?
core_patterns: What happened to Wu Binbin's family?
allowed_answer_scope: What happened to Wu Binbin's family?
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: What happened to Wu Binbin's family?
branchable_topics: What happened to Wu Binbin's family?
return_anchors: What happened to Wu Binbin's family?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Work on the writing prompt activity.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: A writing template for students to describe their own bad but good day. Key patterns: Bad luck often brings good luck.
core_patterns: Bad luck often brings good luck.
allowed_answer_scope: Bad luck often brings good luck.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Bad luck often brings good luck.
branchable_topics: Now write about your bad but good day.
return_anchors: Bad luck often brings good luck.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Read and retell the key story events.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Zoom dreams about going to the moon, meeting Chang'e and the rabbit, and returning by spaceship. He then wakes up and realizes it was a dream. Key patterns: How was your holiday?; Where did you go?
core_patterns: Yes, I did. Oops, where did I put the pictures?
allowed_answer_scope: It's time to go. Good! Here comes a spaceship.
I saw Chang'e, the rabbit and the tree.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: How was your holiday?
